info.title: OmniMission API
info.description:
**OmniMission** exposes a REST surface for health checks and mounts a **FastMCP** server for agents.

- **OpenAPI** (this spec): `/openapi.json`, interactive docs: `/docs`, ReDoc: `/redoc`
- **MCP (HTTP)**: mounted at `/mcp` — use an MCP client with streamable HTTP/SSE against that path. Primary tool: `plan_mission` (natural-language mission → ranked skills, scores, x402 preview, install hints).

The MCP protocol is defined by the [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/); this document describes the FastAPI routes only (the MCP sub-app is documented below as an extension path).

get.description: Entry for the FastMCP ASGI app (`http_app`). Clients use MCP streamable HTTP / SSE semantics on this path and its sub-routes. Tool: **plan_mission** — pass a mission string; response includes ranked skills and x402 preview.

200.description: MCP protocol response (SSE or JSON-RPC per client negotiation).

405.description: Some methods may return 405 depending on client and sub-path.

tags.name: mcp
tags.description: Model Context Protocol over HTTP (mounted ASGI app). Not every sub-route is listed here; use an MCP client to negotiate the session.
